text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm passing by the<n>outdoor stage...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Like a swan, I am beauty and might<n>defined!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Whew. Perhaps those steps weretoo magnificent.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Not a single soul has arrived to watch<n>me, but the
mere thought of the crowd<n>crying out my name
sends chills down<n>my spine...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Could it be?! Have you come to<n>see my
performance?!
choice_data_list: Uh, actually, I'm just passing throu—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! There is no need to<n>explain! You
undoubtedly caught a<n>glimpse of me and found
yourself<n>utterly entranced!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I was practicing my post-race victory<n>pose! Your
reaction is nothing short of<n>natural!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What did you think? Do you believe it<n>to be a
performance befitting the<n>effervescence that
suffuses a venue<n>after a race?
choice_data_list: I think just running a victory lap would be better...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What did you think? Do you believe it<n>to be a
performance befitting the<n>effervescence that
suffuses a venue<n>after a race?
choice_data_list: I think just running a victory lap would be better...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A victory lap? Me, the winner, running<n>alone on
the track like the wind...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I see! Yes, that sounds perfectly<n>splendid!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With that victory lap, I shall carve the<n>strength
and beauty of the Overlord<n>into the minds of all!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now that that's settled, I shall start<n>practicing at
once! So commences my<n>victory lap etude!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O takes her leave while<n>waving
goodbye to an imaginary<n>audience.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! Exactly! I knew it<n>was brilliant!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The glorious poses I display on the<n>turf are what
set me apart as the<n>Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now then, time to bring things to a<n>true fever
pitch! Come, don't just<n>stand there! Cheer me
on!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I end up watching T.M. Opera O<n>practice her
posing for quite some<n>time.
